high_severity_findings.summary: Four locator constants (PRODUCTS_TITLE, CART_TITLE, CHECKOUT_INFO_TITLE, OVERVIEW_TITLE) all resolve to the same '.title' CSS selector — ambiguous and collision-prone
wait_for_page_ready uses networkidle which is deprecated in Playwright and is flakiness-prone on CDN/polling-heavy pages
high_severity_findings.required_action: Replace networkidle with wait_for_load_state('load') or targeted element waits

high_severity_findings.summary: Performance assertion threshold is <= 10.0s but SC-1 acceptance criteria require 2-second SLA — regression between 2s and 10s passes automation while violating acceptance criteria
Hardcoded credential fallbacks ('standard_user', 'secret_sauce') stored in source code in utils/testdata.py
high_severity_findings.required_action: Remove literals; use environment variables or require explicit configuration

high_severity_findings.summary: log_dir created by fixture but zero logging calls exist in any module — step-level diagnostic capability is absent
high_severity_findings.required_action: Add logging at key action points in BasePage, LoginPage, and InventoryPage

high_severity_findings.summary: SC1-TC-005 catalog coverage is partial — assert_card_details only checks visibility, not content (non-empty name, valid price format)
high_severity_findings.required_action: Add content-level assertions to move TC-005 from partial to full coverage

strengths: Clean three-layer POM separation (tests / pages / locators) with no selector strings in test layer
All test data fully externalised to testdata/sc_1_data.json
Fixture scoping correct: session-scoped for browser/settings, function-scoped for context/page
Screenshot-on-failure hook captures full page with collision-safe node-ID file names
All 11 SC-1 test cases have automation coverage (9 full, 2 partial)
Parametrized tests cover positive and all required negative scenarios for login and checkout
Settings driven entirely by environment variables — no hard deployment coupling
Markers registered in pytest.ini — no runtime marker warnings
from __future__ import annotations used consistently across all modules
conditional_requirements: Resolve all 6 HIGH severity findings before suite can serve as authoritative regression gate
Address MEDIUM findings (13) before release milestone
Re-review required after HIGH finding remediation
